title: Recorded Future List Management
content:
Manage, view, and edit your lists in Recorded Future.

Cortex XSOAR/XSIAM SOAR playbook from the Recorded Future pack (RecordedFuture, partner-supported).

Integrations/scripts used: RecordedFutureLists.
raw_yaml:
id: Recorded Future List Management
version: -1
description: Manage, view, and edit your lists in Recorded Future.
name: Recorded Future List Management
starttaskid: "0"
tasks:
  "0":
    id: "0"
    taskid: 26352583-6bb9-4a08-8136-536094826dfe
    type: start
    task:
      id: 26352583-6bb9-4a08-8136-536094826dfe
      version: -1
      name: ""
      iscommand: false
      description: ""
      brand: ""
    nexttasks:
      '#none#':
      - "2"
    separatecontext: false
    continueonerrortype: ""
    view: |-
      {
        "position": {
          "x": 50,
          "y": 50
        }
      }
    note: false
    timertriggers: []
    ignoreworker: false
    skipunavailable: false
    quietmode: 0
    isoversize: false
    isautoswitchedtoquietmode: false
  "2":
    id: "2"
    taskid: 91d36804-06a2-4828-8d82-77f91d060805
    type: regular
    task:
      id: 91d36804-06a2-4828-8d82-77f91d060805
      version: -1
      name: Search List
      description: Search for lists in Recorded Future.
      script: RecordedFutureLists|||recordedfuture-lists-search
      type: regular
      iscommand: true
      brand: RecordedFutureLists
    nexttasks:
      '#none#':
      - "3"
    scriptarguments:
      ignore-outputs:
        simple: "false"
      limit:
        simple: "100"
    separatecontext: false
    continueonerrortype: ""
    view: |-
      {
        "position": {
          "x": 50,
          "y": 200
        }
      }
    note: false
    timertriggers: []
    ignoreworker: false
    skipunavailable: false
    quietmode: 2
    isoversize: false
    isautoswitchedtoquietmode: false
  "3":
    id: "3"
    taskid: ef8c7fb2-3a7b-40c6-8861-8df242ab8dde
    type: collection
    task:
      id: ef8c7fb2-3a7b-40c6-8861-8df242ab8dde
      version: -1
      name: List Options
      type: collection
      description: ""
      iscommand: false
      brand: ""
    nexttasks:
      '#none#':
      - "4"
    separatecontext: false
    continueonerrortype: ""
    view: |-
      {
        "position": {
          "x": 50,
          "y": 390
        }
      }
    note: false
    timertriggers: []
    ignoreworker: false
    message:
      to: null
      subject: null
      body: {}
      methods: []
      format: ""
      bcc: null
      cc: null
      timings:
        retriescount: 2
        retriesinterval: 360
        completeafterreplies: 1
        completeafterv2: true
        completeaftersla: false
    form:
      questions:
      - id: "0"
        label: ""
        labelarg:
          simple: Do you want to...
        required: true
        gridcolumns: []
        defaultrows: []
        type: singleSelect
        options: []
        optionsarg:
        - {}
        - simple: Add
        - simple: Remove
        - simple: View
        fieldassociated: ""
        placeholder: ""
        tooltip: ""
        readonly: false
      - id: "1"
        label: ""
        labelarg:
          simple: Which List?
        required: false
        gridcolumns: []
        defaultrows: []
        type: multiSelect
        options: []
        optionsarg:
        - simple: ${RecordedFuture.List.name}
        fieldassociated: ""
        placeholder: ""
        tooltip: ""
        readonly: false
      - id: "2"
        label: ""
        labelarg:
          simple: What Entity?
        required: false
        gridcolumns: []
        defaultrows: []
        type: shortText
        options: []
        optionsarg: []
        fieldassociated: ""
        placeholder: ""
        tooltip: 'Input entities to add/remove, separate by comma (for urls containing
          commas: replace comma with %2C). Leave blank if viewing a list.'
        readonly: false
      title: Add, Remove, View?
      description: ""
      sender: Your SOC team
      expired: false
      totalanswers: 0
    skipunavailable: false
    quietmode: 0
    isoversize: false
    isautoswitchedtoquietmode: false
  "4":
    id: "4"
    taskid: f6c03720-f49c-4609-8795-968d7908138c
    type: condition
    task:
      id: f6c03720-f49c-4609-8795-968d7908138c
      version: -1
      name: Add, Remove, View
      type: condition
      description: ""
      iscommand: false
      brand: ""
    nexttasks:
      '#default#':
      - "10"
      add:
      - "8"
      remove:
      - "9"
    separatecontext: false
    conditions:
    - label: add
      condition:
      - - operator: isEqualString
          left:
            value:
              simple: Add, Remove, View?.Answers.0
            iscontext: true
          right:
            value:
              simple: Add
    - label: remove
      condition:
      - - operator: isEqualString
          left:
            value:
              simple: Add, Remove, View?.Answers.0
            iscontext: true
          right:
            value:
              simple: Remove
    continueonerrortype: ""
    view: |-
      {
        "position": {
          "x": 50,
          "y": 570
        }
      }
    note: false
    timertriggers: []
    ignoreworker: false
    skipunavailable: false
    quietmode: 0
    isoversize: false
    isautoswitchedtoquietmode: false
  "5":
    id: "5"
    taskid: da0fedcd-8f14-4880-83bf-add93288f372
    type: regular
    task:
      id: da0fedcd-8f14-4880-83bf-add93288f372
      version: -1
      name: Add Entities
      description: Add entities to a list. Separate entities by commas. "NOTE:" If
        entity type is specified, only one entity type can be added with each action.
      script: RecordedFutureLists|||recordedfuture-lists-add-entities
      type: regular
      iscommand: true
      brand: RecordedFutureLists
    scriptarguments:
      freetext_names:
        simple: ${Add, Remove, View?.Answers.2}
      list_id:
        simple: ${ListID}
    separatecontext: false
    continueonerrortype: ""
    view: |-
      {
        "position": {
          "x": -370,
          "y": 970
        }
      }
    note: false
    timertriggers: []

      version: -1
      name: Remove Entities
      description: Remove entities from a list. Separate entities by commas. "NOTE:"
        If entity type is specified, only one entity type can be added with each action.
      script: RecordedFutureLists|||recordedfuture-lists-remove-entities
      type: regular
      iscommand: true
      brand: RecordedFutureLists
    scriptarguments:
      freetext_names:
        simple: ${Add, Remove, View?.Answers.2}
      list_id:

    separatecontext: false
    continueonerrortype: ""
    view: |-

      name: Get List ID
      description: Search for lists in Recorded Future.
      script: RecordedFutureLists|||recordedfuture-lists-search

      brand: RecordedFutureLists
    nexttasks:
